title: Founder's Associate
must_haves: 2-4 years in consulting, VC/PE, investment banking or partner/client development
hard_blockers: Role closed - no longer accepting applications

one_line_verdict: Closed; even if open, the consulting/VC/IB-pedigree framing disadvantages a crypto-startup operator profile.
fetch_note: Confirmed closed via Kindred Capital VC job board ('This job is no longer accepting applications'); apply contact hiring@natter.co. Natter = AI+video voice-of-community for enterprise (Deloitte, L&G).
